name: Ruins of the Divine Dragon Lords
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>巨</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>きょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>遺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>跡</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せき</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Ruins of the Giant God Dragons
desc: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned, except from the GY while you control a Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster: Negate that face-up Special Summoned monster(s)'s effects until the end of this turn (even if this card leaves the field). Once per turn: You can send 1 other face-up card you control to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dragon Lord Token" (Dragon/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; add this card to your hand.
eff: If a monster(s) is Special Summoned, except from the GY while you control a Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster: Negate that face-up Special Summoned monster(s)'s effects until the end of this turn (even if this card leaves the field). Once per turn: You can send 1 other face-up card you control to the GY; Special Summon 1 "Dragon Lord Token" (Dragon/LIGHT/Level 1/ATK 0/DEF 0). If this card is in your GY: You can send 1 Level 7 or 8 Dragon monster from your hand or face-up field to the GY; add this card to your hand.

sets.set: Rise of the True Dragons Structure Deck

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck R: Revival of the Great Divine Dragon

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
